_note: Acest catalog listeaza skill-urile disponibile pentru instalare. Statusul 'installed' se deriva din filesystem (skills/{name}/SKILL.md). Nu pune campul 'installed' aici. Campul 'concurrency_pattern' (optional) indica skill-uri paralelizate — vezi AGENTS.md > Concurrency Patterns.

skills.name: brand-voice
skills.description: Extrage sau construieste un profil de voce de brand (4 moduri: import, extract, build, auto-scrape)

skills.name: brand-audience
skills.description: Construieste un profil de client ideal (ICP) prin interviu sau market research

skills.name: brand-positioning
skills.description: Gaseste unghiul de pozitionare care te diferentiaza de competitori

skills.name: sys-onboard
skills.description: Onboarding interactiv: starter pack, interviu in 5 intrebari, personalizare brand, rulare prima skill

skills.name: sys-audit
skills.description: Scor 4C (Context, Connections, Capabilities, Cadence) din 100 cu loop de revizie automata

skills.name: sys-level-up
skills.description: 5 intrebari de descoperire pentru a gasi urmatoarea oportunitate de automatizare

skills.name: sys-daily-plan
skills.description: Planificare de dimineata: citeste memoria, prioritatile si open threads pentru un plan zilnic focusat

skills.name: sys-skill-builder
skills.description: Creeaza skill-uri noi cu frontmatter corect, structura de directoare si validare prin test

skills.name: sys-session-close
skills.description: Inchidere de sesiune cu colectare feedback, finalizare memorie si verificare git

skills.name: sys-session-open
skills.description: Deschidere de sesiune cu identity load, recovery check si surfacing open threads. Apelat de hook-ul UserPromptSubmit la primul prompt.

skills.name: sys-goal-breakdown
skills.description: Sparge un obiectiv in task-uri actionabile pe 3 nivele de complexitate

skills.name: content-blog-post
skills.description: Articole blog optimizate SEO, aliniate la voce si audienta. Mode=options pentru 3 variante stilistice paralele.

skills.name: content-social-post
skills.description: Posturi pentru retele sociale cu formatare specifica platformei

skills.name: content-repurpose
skills.description: Transforma un singur continut in posturi native pentru 8 platforme sociale. Generare paralela per platforma.

skills.name: content-email-sequence
skills.description: Secvente de email-uri (welcome, nurture, lansare, re-engagement)

skills.name: content-copywriting
skills.description: Copy persuasiv cu scoring pe 7 dimensiuni pentru landing pages, ads, emails. Mode=options pentru 3 variante stilistice paralele.

skills.name: content-newsletter
skills.description: Editii de newsletter cu link-uri curate, comentariu si CTA-uri

skills.name: content-case-study
skills.description: Studii de caz din note de interviu sau date brute

skills.name: content-landing-page
skills.description: Copy de landing page cu hero, beneficii, social proof, CTA

skills.name: research-competitors
skills.description: Analiza competitori cu mesaj, preturi, feature comparison si gap detection. 1 agent per competitor in paralel.

skills.name: research-trending
skills.description: Scaneaza web, social, news pentru trenduri emergente intr-o nisa. 5 surse paralele + synthesizer.

skills.name: research-keyword
skills.description: Keyword research cu clasificare intent + content gap analysis

skills.name: brand-style-guide
skills.description: Genereaza un brand style guide complet din voice, audience, positioning

skills.name: tool-humanizer
skills.description: Sterge pattern-uri AI din text (10 categorii, 3 moduri)

skills.name: tool-whatsapp
skills.description: Trimite mesaje WhatsApp Business prin Cloud API. Util pentru CTA-uri si notificari client.

skills.name: tool-drive
skills.description: Citeste / cauta / descarca fisiere din Google Drive folosind un service account

skills.name: tool-wp-publisher
skills.description: Publica continut pe WordPress cu metadata SEO si imagini featured

skills.name: tool-social-scheduler
skills.description: Programeaza posturi pe retele sociale prin API extern

skills.name: sys-cron-manager
skills.description: Creeaza, editeaza si monitorizeaza job-uri cron recurente

skills.name: sys-client-onboard
skills.description: Configureaza un workspace nou de client cu fisiere brand, structura proiecte si context

skills.name: sys-archive-memory
skills.description: Arhiveaza fisierele de memorie zilnice intr-un sumar lunar (rollup)

skills.name: sys-connections-scan
skills.description: Scaneaza .env si MCP config, identifica conexiunile active si actualizeaza connections.md

starterPacks.name: creator
starterPacks.description: Creatori de continut, YouTuberi, autori de newsletter
